sub: More clients, same you. UnitLift automates everything in between — from sending plans to tracking payments — while you do what you do best.
note: No credit card · Setup in 5 minutes · Cancel anytime
howTit: Three steps to a complete coaching system
howSub: From registration to your first client in under 10 minutes.

steps.d: Register and customize training and nutrition parameters to match your coaching approach. Fast and intuitive.
Invite clients by email. They download the mobile app and instantly have access to all their plans.
Create plans, track progress through check-ins and communicate — all from one interface.

mobSub: The coach tracks everything from their phone. The client has their own app with plans, check-ins and chat.

mobFeats.d: Check check-ins, finances and client messages directly from your phone. Add the app to your home screen.
Client opens the app, fills in the check-in and saves. You instantly see progress. Automatic weekly reminder.
All messages in one place. No more messy WhatsApp conversations.

priceSub: Choose the plan that fits your business. Change anytime.
trialT: 14 days free — card not charged immediately
trialS: Try all features. Cancel anytime, no penalties.
priceNote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No commitment.

testimonials.q: Finally one place for everything. Before I used WhatsApp, Excel and a bunch of random apps — now everything is in one place and I save an hour a day.
testimonials.name: Mark K.

testimonials.q: As a client, I love how everything works through one app. My coach sends me a plan, I fill in the check-in and he immediately sees my progress. No more messages everywhere.
testimonials.name: Ana M.

testimonials.q: I went from 8 to 15 clients without extra stress. The check-in system automatically reminds clients and I immediately see who's late.
testimonials.name: Tom N.

testimonials.q: I've been using UnitLift for 4 months and the difference is huge. I have access to all my plans in one app, my coach sees every check-in and communication is great.
testimonials.name: Ivan B.

testimonials.q: Clients are thrilled with the mobile app. They have all plans instantly available and can send check-ins directly from the app. Much more professional.
testimonials.name: Sara P.

testimonials.q: Weekly check-ins changed my approach to training. My coach sees where I'm struggling and immediately adjusts the plan. It feels like having a personal trainer in my pocket.
testimonials.name: Petra L.

testimonials.q: Administration reduced to a minimum. Plans, payments, communication — all in one. Clients love having their own app, and I have more time for the actual work.
testimonials.name: Luke H.

testimonials.q: Financial reports and payment tracking saved my sanity. I know exactly who has paid and when each subscription expires. I recommend it to all coaches.
testimonials.name: Maja R.

faqs.q: Is a credit card required to register?
faqs.a: No. Try UnitLift for 14 days completely free, without entering credit card details. A card is only required when you decide to continue with a paid plan.

faqs.q: Do my clients have to pay for the app?
faqs.a: No. The client app is completely free to download and use on iOS and Android. Only you as the coach pay, for platform access.
Less than 5 minutes. Registration is fast, and you can invite your first client the same day.

faqs.q: Does UnitLift work on mobile for coaches?
faqs.a: Yes. The web app is fully responsive — you can add it to your phone's home screen as an app. Clients have a dedicated iOS and Android app.

faqs.q: Can I have my own logo and colors?
faqs.a: Yes, on Pro and Scale plans. Add your logo, choose primary colors and connect social networks. Clients see your brand.

faqs.q: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.a: Yes, with no penalties. You can cancel at any time from your account settings.

ctaT:
How many clients can you manage
when you don't spend half the day on admin?
ctaS: Coaches on UnitLift add an average of 4–6 new clients in their first quarter. Free for 14 days.
ctaN: No credit card · Cancel anytime · GDPR compliant
tagline: Coaching platform for online fitness coaches. More clients, less chaos.
